title: Decision trees + DSA Binary Search
focus: Splits (Gini/entropy), pruning, why trees are high-variance.

items.label: Find Minimum IN Rotated Sorted Array
interviewQuestions: Why does mid-vs-right comparison work but mid-vs-left can mislead with duplicates?
How does the algorithm change if duplicates are allowed?

items.label: Search IN Rotated Sorted Array
interviewQuestions: How do you decide which half is sorted on each step? Walk through with a small example.
What changes if duplicates are allowed (LC 81)?

items.label: How a decision tree splits: Gini, entropy, information gain
interviewQuestions: How does a decision tree decide where to split? Compare Gini vs entropy.
Why are decision trees high-variance, and how does pruning help?

items.label: Trees vs linear models: when each wins
interviewQuestions: When does a tree-based model crush a linear model and vice versa?
Why don't decision trees need feature scaling?

items.label: Feature importance: gain, permutation, SHAP
interviewQuestions: Compare gain-based feature importance, permutation importance, and SHAP — pros and cons.
Why can gain-based importance be misleading when features are correlated?
